title: MONOPOLY® PLUS

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: There are two things you have to do. First you have to make a wineprefix to install uplay directly from their website. Then after installing Monopoly plus with steam you have to overwrite the uplay installed by steam with the uplay you installed in the wineprefix. After that on the first start you have to disable the overlay for Uplay and then kill the whole uplay-monopoly process and restart the game. If you did everything it should work perfectly fine for local games, online is not working due to Uplay overlay is disabled.
title: MONOPOLY® PLUS
